_comment: Apify config. The apify_token field below is committed because Claude Code Routines (cloud) do not currently expose a secret store — see anthropics/claude-code#32733. APIFY_TOKEN env var remains the preferred future path: once routine-level secrets ship, revert this field to REPLACE_WITH_ACTUAL_TOKEN and store the real token as a routine secret. agent/sources/apify_linkedin.py already reads APIFY_TOKEN env var first and falls back to this field. If compromised, rotate at apify.com/account/integrations and replace the value here (or set the env var if routine secrets are available by then).
